synthesis: Spain progressed to the World Cup semifinals following a 2-1 victory over Belgium. Meanwhile, the Egyptian national team returned home to a public parade after concluding their World Cup run with a last-16 exit against Argentina. Pre-match coverage indicates a forthcoming quarterfinal match between Norway and England in Miami.
confidence: HIGH. The sources consist of independent reports from the same publisher detailing distinct sporting events.
